servinfosub.title: Shift Lock Solenoid Control
servinfosub.ptxt: This system consists of shift lock solenoid control system and interlock control system.

The shift lock solenoid control system is so designed that the select lever cannot be shifted from P range unless engine switch is pressed to change the ignition to ON and the brake pedal is depressed.
In this system, ignition can be changed to OFF only when select lever is in P range and select lever button is released.

servinfosub.title: Shift Lock Solenoid Manual Release
servinfosub.ptxt: When pushing shift lock manual release button (1), select lever can be moved from P range to another range even without depressing the brake pedal. (To shift select lever from P range to any other range, set ignition ON or ACC.)
